query: I have before/after blood pressure for 18 patients. Shapiro on the differences gives p = 0.003. Which test?
expected_behavior: Recommends the Wilcoxon signed-rank test (and does NOT recommend the paired t-test)
Identifies the design as paired (within-subject / before-after)
Names the Shapiro-Wilk p-value (p = 0.003) as the gating assumption check that drove the choice
